## Checklist

- [ ] `make check` passes (`gofmt`, `go vet`, `go test -race`)
- [ ] New behaviour has tests (httptest-based, no network/credentials)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] No API keys, tokens, or real fiscal data in code, tests, or examples
- [ ] Money goes through the `Decimal` type (not `float64`)
